programme.title: Killer Night Shift
programme.desc: (2018) Thriller with Ashleigh Dorrell. Amy begins her first night shift at a hotel. But this is a place with a dark past, and sometimes history repeats itself... Will she survive the graveyard shift?

programme.title: My Stepfather's Secret
programme.desc: (2019) Thriller with Vanessa Marcil. A college student returns home to discover her mother has a new fiancé. But as she finds out more about him, should it be alarm bells rather than wedding bells?

programme.title: Death By Friendship
programme.desc: (2020) Thriller with Natalie Brown. Recently divorced Hope thinks her struggling daughter is back on track when she bonds with Cassie, whose parents also split. But is Cassie a friend or a foe?

programme.title: A Deadly Lullaby
programme.desc: After losing her child, Olivia meets a woman and her daughter.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: (2008) Western with Luke Perry, C. Thomas Howell and Kim Coates. After killing an innocent man, an ex-lawman on a quest for revenge makes a pledge that takes him straight into the path of his prey.

programme.title: Acts of Violence
programme.desc: (2018) Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her.

programme.title: First Kill
programme.desc: (2017) Action thriller with Bruce Willis and Hayden Christensen. A father rapidly runs out of options when his family vacation is derailed by murderous criminals and his son is taken hostage.

programme.title: The Quick And The Dead
programme.desc: (1963) War drama starring Victor French and Majel Barrett. With the aid of local partisans, a group of American soldiers try to make it through enemy-occupied Italy to safety.

programme.title: The Proud Rebel
programme.desc: (1958) Western starring Alan Ladd. A soldier returns home after the Civil War to find his wife dead and his son shocked into silence. He rides out, determined to find both a cure and justice.

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A couple of unusual passengers are causing excitement on a flight to Chicago's Sea World, and a man dressed as a tiger causes intrigue on the ground in Chicago. S1Ep16

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: There is frustration for the Airline staff as passengers turn up late and irate, and a passenger faces an anxious wait as she tries to get to her dying mother in time. S1Ep17

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Two unaccompanied minors are close to boarding the wrong flight, and team members audition for the staff holiday cabaret - with the winners performing for passengers at the departure gates. S1Ep18

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Staff have to handle a drunken passenger at 7am in the morning, stormy weather causes severe delays, and a supervisor has to inform a customer that he is too big for a plane seat. S1Ep1

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Anita tells an angry family that they must buy an extra plane ticket for their toddler, and a passenger supervisor tries to calm a nervous flyer in Los Angeles. S1Ep2

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: The largest blackout in US history causes chaos to air travel with flight delays, cancellations and airports filled with increasingly angry stranded passengers. S1Ep3

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A Southwest pilot is set to retire after 30 years of service, and it is the end of an era for Chicago's Terminal F. S1Ep4

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Manager Colleen's patience is tested to the limit by a rowdy group of BMX bikers, a boy takes his first unaccompanied flight, and a stressed mum and her two kids miss their flight in Chicago. S1Ep5

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: Supervisor Mike Carr turns detective as he tries to solve the mystery of a missing ticket, and a passenger travels to LA to fulfil her lifelong dream to be a contestant on The Price is Right. S1Ep6

programme.title: Airline USA
programme.desc: A customer changes her clothes in full sight of her fellow passengers, the police are called to assist with a group of drunk women, and in Chicago, it is 70's day at the airport. S1Ep7

programme.title: Abducted
programme.desc: (2006) Captivating drama with Sarah Wynter. The lonely wife of a prison warden falls for an inmate she believes is innocent and helps him escape, only to make a shocking discovery about his motives.

programme.title: Cruel Fixation
programme.desc: (2019) Tense thriller starring Kristina Klebe. A recently widowed woman grows suspicious of her insular son's new friend. Could his seemingly strange obsession with her turn sinister?

programme.title: Stolen in Her Sleep
programme.desc: (2021) Psychological thriller with Morgan Bradley. A new mother's world unravels when she suspects someone is trying to steal her baby - is it real or a dangerous figment of her sleep-deprived mind?

programme.title: The Bad Twin
programme.desc: (2016) Psychological thriller starring Haylie Duff. A radio host takes in her estranged sister's teenage twins, only to discover one of them harbours a dangerous dark side...
